name: Cortez Farmers Market

Months Open.value: May, June, July, August, September, October

Products.value: Fresh local produce, pork, lamb, eggs, baked goods, beverages, herbs, plants, artisan crafts/goods, plus live music and family-friendly activities

notes: On-file website https://www.cortezfarmersmarket.com/ is real and current (operated by Onward A Legacy Foundation DBA Cortez Farmers Market); it's a JS-rendered Wix-style site that the fetch tool could not render directly, so Hours/Months Open are taken from search-indexed snapshots of that homepage rather than a direct fetch -- worth a manual spot-check before publishing. Market is hosted/organized by the Cortez Retail Enhancement Association (CREA, shopcortez.com), whose contact info (phone/email) is used as the market's contact since the market has no separate listed contact. On-file address '601 N Mildred Rd' matches the market's stated location (corner of Empire & Mildred, Kiva/Children's Kiva Montessori Charter School parking lot) so it was left unchanged. On-file Facebook (group link) confirmed active/official. Could not confirm ADA accessibility or certified-organic status anywhere -- omitted. A separate CREA-branded Facebook (facebook.com/Cortez-Retail-Enhancement-Association-890695857623789) and Instagram (instagram.com/shopcortez) exist but belong to the parent org, not the market specifically, so were not used.
